```{=latex}
\newpage

\hypertarget{acronyms}{\section*{List of Acronyms}\label{acronyms}}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{List of Acronyms}

% define acronyms

\newacronym{ar}{AR}{Augmented Reality}
\newacronym{cps}{CPS}{Cyber-Physical Systems}
\newacronym{dt}{DT}{Digital Twin}
\newacronym{fov}{FOV}{Field of View}
\newacronym{gps}{GPS}{Global Positioning System}
\newacronym{hmdar}{HMDAR}{Head-Mounted Augmented Reality Display}
\newacronym{hmdmr}{HMDMR}{Head-Mounted Mixed Reality Display}
\newacronym{hmd}{HMD}{Head-Mounted Display}
\newacronym{i40}{I4.0}{Industry 4.0}
\newacronym{iot}{IOT}{Internet of Things}
\newacronym{mr}{MR}{Mixed Reality}
\newacronym{ost}{OST}{Optical See-Through}
\newacronym{qr}{QR}{Quick Response}
\newacronym{vac}{VAC}{Vergence-Accommodation Conflict}
\newacronym{vr}{VR}{Virtual Reality}
\newacronym{vst}{VST}{Video See-Through}
\newacronym{xr}{XR}{Extended Reality}

\printglossaries
```

TODO: add list of acronyms using glossaries package
